title: Properties and Methods
description: Define attributes and behaviors inside classes.

slides.title: Properties (Attributes)
Methods (Behaviors)
Complete Example
slides.codeSnippet:
<?php
class Car {
    public $color;
    public $brand;
    public function setColor($color) {
        $this->color = $color;
    }
    public function getDescription() {
        return "This car is a " . $this->color . " " . $this->brand;
    }
}
$myCar = new Car();
$myCar->brand = 'Toyota';
$myCar->setColor('blue');
echo $myCar->getDescription();
?>

quizData.question: Inside a class method, how do you refer to the current object's property $color?
quizData.explanation: $this refers to the current object instance.
